name: log-hygiene-sanitizer
description: Static Cloudflare Pages app for local browser-based log sanitization.

scripts.build: node --check app.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const file of ['index.html','styles.css','app.js','_headers']) fs.accessSync(file); fs.mkdirSync('dist', {recursive: true}); for (const file of ['index.html','styles.css','app.js','_headers']) fs.copyFileSync(file, 'dist/' + file);"
